The issue is that xUnit runs tests in parallel, so draining in the constructor won't be enough — other test classes may be enqueuing at the same time. I need to make the notification service tests not depend on queue being empty, or run them in isolation. The simplest fix is to make each test that asserts on `ReceiveNotification` immediately after `SendNotification` — the FIFO nature means tests that first drain, then send, then receive should still get their item... but parallel execution from other classes is the problem.
